zh.lifeSummary: 當John Barley於1360年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，他的父親Richard Piperell Barley30歲，母親Isabel Sacheverell27歲。他和Mlle Chorely至少有1個女兒。他去世於1429年2月15日在英國賀特福爾阿爾布瑞享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿爾布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Barley于1360年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾时，他的父亲Richard Piperell Barley30岁，母亲Isabel Sacheverell27岁。他和Mlle Chorely至少有1个女儿。他去世于1429年2月15日在英国賀特福爾阿爾布瑞享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾阿爾布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Barley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Barley. Those in Lancashire and Yorkshire are named with Old English bār ‘wild boar’ or bere ‘barley’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. A place of the same name in Hertfordshire has as its first element an unattested Old English byname Be(o)ra (from bera ‘bear’).

English: metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of barley, from Middle English barli, barlich ‘barley’ (Old English bærlic, originally an adjective derivative of bær ‘barley’, a byform of bere).
Americanized form of South German Behrle or of its Swiss German cognates Beerli, Berli, or Berly, and probably also of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare Berley .

variants.name: Behrle
meanings: South German (Württemberg): from a pet form of Behr ‘bear’, including from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with Old High German bero ‘bear’.
Altered form of Norwegian Berle: habitational name from a farmstead in the county of Sogn og Fjordane, so named with Old Norse barth ‘rim, edge’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Barley was born in 1360, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Piperell Barley, was 30 and his mother, Isabel Sacheverell, was 27. He had at least 1 daughter with Mlle Chorely. He died on 15 February 1429, in Albury, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Albury, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Barley est né en 1360, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Piperell Barley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabel Sacheverell, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Mlle Chorely. Il est décédé le 15 février 1429, à Albury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Albury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Barley 1360 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Piperell Barley 30 und seine Mutter Isabel Sacheverell 27. Er hatte mit Mlle Chorely mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Februar 1429 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Albury, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Albury, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Barley è nato il nel 1360 nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Piperell Barley, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Sacheverell, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Mlle Chorely. Morì il 15 febbraio 1429, nel Albury, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Albury, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Barleyが1360年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Piperell Barleyは30歳，母Isabel Sacheverellは27歳であった。彼はMlle Chorelyとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1429年2月15日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルブリーで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Barley(이)가 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Piperell Barley(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Sacheverell(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Mlle Chorely(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1429년 2월 15일 영국 허트퍼드실르 알버이에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Barley nasceu em 1360, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Piperell Barley, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Sacheverell, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Mlle Chorely. Ele faleceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1429, em Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Barley родился в 1360 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Piperell Barley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Sacheverell, 27. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Mlle Chorely. Он умер 15 февраля 1429 г. в местности албури, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности албури, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
